generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloud
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing vehicle speed, position, and orientation data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder sensor measuring speed and torque"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring wheel position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor, MotorSensor, SteeringServoSensor
]

instance ObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor, LiDARSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloud
]

instance VehicleStateDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed, position, and orientation data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracks
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path based on detected obstacles and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedDrivingPath
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 component for clustering and tracking objects from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTracksData
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component for serializing data, aligning message types, and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARPointCloudData, VehicleStateDataInstance, ObjectTracksData, ProjectedDrivingPathData
]

instance CloudOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based processing for ACC functions including lead vehicle detection and speed calculation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RemoteControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote control of ACC functions from operator interface"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataCollectingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Frontend component responsible for collecting raw sensor data from physical vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Frontend for pre-processing raw sensor data before clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected paths, and object tracks via UI with reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, Reporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transfers ACC system processing (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) to cloud infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:provides OffloadedProcessing
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to control ACC functions (enable/disable, set speed, emergency braking) remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, SetSpeed, EmergencyBrake
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path"
]

instance Reporting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System data reporting capabilities for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance OffloadedProcessing : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Cloud-based processing of ACC functions to alleviate on-board ECU resources"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote setting of desired ACC speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrake : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote activation of emergency braking system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User-facing entity for system monitoring and control"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity handling data management and control mechanisms"
    base:contains DataCollectingFE, DataPreProcessingFE, DataTranslation, CloudOffloading, DataVisualization, RemoteControl
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity hosting automotive functionality"
    base:contains LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor, MotorSensor, SteeringServoSensor, PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time data display"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for remote control of ACC functions"
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Frontend component for collecting raw sensor data"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Pre-processing frontend for sensor data"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node for point cloud clustering and object tracking"
]

instance DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for data serialization and unit conversion"
]

instance CloudOffloading : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud-based processing component for ACC functions"
]

instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Enabler for data visualization services"
]

instance RemoteControl : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote control operations"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by hardware limitations despite some standards requiring stricter synchronization (less than 100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as individual ROS2 packages with ROS2 nodes. The system organizes components into User, Digital Twin, and Physical Twin Entities, with the Physical Twin Entity deviating from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality beyond resource-specific tasks, and communication between entities is managed via ROS2-based node interactions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, and inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP as the transport layer protocol."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (defining Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Interoperability is supported through OPC Unified Architecture for data collection and device control operations."
]
